decisions.rationale: Clean separation; attempt_id in URL enables resume detection and session locking

decisions.decision: Session locking via DB attempt (not sessionStorage)
decisions.rationale: Refresh = new random questions is exploitable; lock 20 question IDs in quiz_attempts at start time

decisions.decision: Tab switches: warn banner on 1st, auto-submit on 3rd
decisions.rationale: User confirmed this UX; prevents indefinite alt-tabbing to notes

decisions.decision: Mark complete requires 30s elapsed AND scroll past 90%
decisions.rationale: Time alone does not prove reading; both conditions prevent button-mashing

decisions.decision: Sequential lesson gate server-side with force-dynamic
decisions.rationale: ISR page cannot do per-user gating reliably; force-dynamic required

decisions.decision: Sidebar: completed accessible, first incomplete accessible, all ahead locked
decisions.rationale: Visual enforcement of sequential order; completed lessons remain reviewable
Escalating marks as knowledge expected to deepen

decisions.decision: 200 questions per level, 40 per topic, draw 4/topic = 20/attempt (L11: 10 topics x 2)
